install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install einops timm beartype hydra-core==1.3 omegaconf wandb scipy lpips torchmetrics==1.3.2 clean-fid

data_deps.name: alphaflow_runtime_data
data_deps.description: CIFAR-10, clean-fid CIFAR stats/Inception weights, and VGG16 cache used by meanflow perceptual-loss CV tasks.
